features.title: More than a game
features.subtitle: Modern technology serving traditional games.
feature.multiplayer.title: Real-time multiplayer
feature.multiplayer.desc: WebRTC P2P with TURN/STUN relay for traversing NATs and mobile CGNAT.
feature.offline.title: Offline mode
feature.offline.desc: Play against 8 AI bots even without internet. Auto-sync when back online.
feature.privacy.title: Privacy first
feature.privacy.desc: Data hosted in the EU, GDPR-compliant. Zero advertising tracking.
feature.languages.title: Trilingual
feature.languages.desc: French, English and Arabic (with RTL support). More languages coming.
feature.fair.title: Anti-cheat
feature.fair.desc: Authoritative server with cryptographic move validation and verifiable RNG seeds.
feature.crossplatform.title: Cross-platform
feature.crossplatform.desc: Android (direct APK + Play Store soon) and iOS (open TestFlight).
how.title: Get started in 1 minute
how.step1.title: Download
how.step1.desc: Get the Solitaire APK directly from this site (211 MB).
how.step2.title: Install
how.step2.desc: Allow installation from unknown sources in Android settings.
how.step3.title: Play
how.step3.desc: Open the app, pick a variant and start your first game.

download.solitaireDesc: 192 solitaire variants (Klondike, Spider, FreeCell, TriPeaks, Pyramid, Yukon, Forty Thieves) + P2P multiplayer + AI bots.
auth.loginWelcome: Welcome back! Sign in to your account.
faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about SallyCards.
faq.a1: Yes, SallyCards is 100% free. All games and features are accessible without any payment.
faq.q2: Which games are available right now?
faq.a2: Sally Solitaire is available as a direct Android APK. The 9 other games (Ronda, Kdoub, Belote, Poker, Tarot, Scopa, Okey, Memory, Who-is-it) are coming in the next weeks.
faq.a3: Yes! You can play against AI bots in offline mode. Multiplayer requires an internet connection.
faq.a4: Android via direct APK from this site (Play Store coming). iOS via TestFlight (under review).
faq.a5: Create a private table and share the code, or join a public table. WebRTC P2P with TURN relay for NAT traversal.
faq.a6: 8 AI bots with variable difficulty, from beginner to expert. Pick the level that suits you.
